heading: Fields
body:
| Field       | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Necessity |
| ----------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------- |
| atlas       | object | Location to write the documents from the aggregation pipeline.                                                                                                                                                                                               | Required  |
| clusterName | string | Name of the Atlas cluster.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Required  |
| coll        | string | Name of the collection on the Atlas cluster.                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Required  |
| db          | string | Name of the database on the Atlas cluster that contains the collection.                                                                                                                                                                                      | Required  |
| projectId   | string | Unique identifier of the project that contains the Atlas cluster. The project ID must be the ID of the project that contains your federated database instance. If omitted, defaults to the ID of the project that contains your federated database instance. | Optional  |
